component.name: Divider
component.description: A horizontal rule that visually separates sections of content. Styled with the default border token. No props beyond className.
component.figmaNodeId: none — no Figma component set exists

when: Separating distinct sections within a Card or page layout
Creating visual breaks between list items or content groups

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Divider as a top or bottom border for a container
antiPatterns.reason: Card and Box have border tokens already. Adding a Divider duplicates the visual boundary.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use the container's existing border. Reserve Divider for internal content separation.

antiPatterns.scenario: Adding margin to Divider to control spacing
antiPatterns.reason: Divider has no margin by design — spacing belongs to the parent layout primitive.
antiPatterns.alternative: Control spacing with the gap prop on the surrounding Stack.

purpose.default: Horizontal rule with the default border token.

compositionPatterns.name: section-break
compositionPatterns.description: Divider placed between two Stacks inside a Card to visually separate form sections.
